inputs.label: Consumption
inputs.businessContext: Total energy consumption in kilowatt-hours for the billing period

businessContext_i18n.en: Total energy consumption in kilowatt-hours for the billing period
businessContext_i18n.tr: Fatura dönemi için toplam enerji tüketimi (kilowatt-saat cinsinden)

inputs.label: Peak Rate
inputs.businessContext: Price per kilowatt-hour during peak usage hours

businessContext_i18n.en: Price per kilowatt-hour during peak usage hours
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yoğun kullanım saatlerinde kilowatt-saat başına fiyat

inputs.label: Off-Peak Rate
inputs.businessContext: Price per kilowatt-hour during off-peak usage hours

businessContext_i18n.en: Price per kilowatt-hour during off-peak usage hours
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yoğun olmayan kullanım saatlerinde kilowatt-saat başına fiyat

inputs.label: Peak Usage Fraction
inputs.businessContext: Estimated percentage of total consumption that occurs during peak hours (0-100)

businessContext_i18n.en: Estimated percentage of total consumption that occurs during peak hours (0-100)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Toplam tüketimin yoğun saatlerde gerçekleşen tahmini yüzdesi (0-100)

inputs.label: Standing Charge
inputs.businessContext: Fixed daily charge applied by the energy supplier regardless of consumption

businessContext_i18n.en: Fixed daily charge applied by the energy supplier regardless of consumption
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tüketimden bağımsız olarak enerji tedarikçisi tarafından uygulanan sabit günlük ücret

inputs.label: Billing Days
inputs.businessContext: Number of days in the billing period

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of days in the billing period

inputs.label: Tax Rate
inputs.businessContext: Value-added tax (VAT) or similar tax percentage applied to the subtotal

businessContext_i18n.en: Value-added tax (VAT) or similar tax percentage applied to the subtotal
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ara toplama uygulanan katma değer vergisi (KDV) veya benzeri vergi yüzdesi

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
